metadata.name: Manage Checkmk Host
metadata.description: Manages host entries in Checkmk monitoring using the checkmk.general.host Ansible module. Creates or updates host configuration in your Checkmk instance.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Manages host entries in Checkmk monitoring using the `checkmk.general.host` Ansible module. Creates or updates host configuration in your Checkmk instance.

## How to Use
This template renders `main.yml` as a file.

1. Review the Checkmk connection details and the host entry you want to create or update.
2. Fill in the required variables for the task you want to automate, then adjust optional safety or notification settings as needed.
3. Render the playbook and run it from a control machine that can reach the Checkmk API.

## Variable Guide
### Checkmk Configuration
- `checkmk_server`: Checkmk Server; required.
- `checkmk_protocol`: Checkmk Server Protocol; required; default: https.
- `checkmk_site`: Checkmk Site; required; default: cmk.
- `checkmk_user`: Checkmk Automation User; required.
- `checkmk_pass`: Checkmk Automation User Password; required.

### Host Configuration
- `host_name`: Hostname to add to Checkmk; required.
- `host_ip`: IP address of the host; required.
- `host_folder`: Folder path in Checkmk; required; default: /.

## References
- [Checkmk Ansible Collection](https://github.com/Checkmk/ansible-collection-checkmk.general)
- [Checkmk Documentation](https://docs.checkmk.com/)
## Pre-Requisites
- A running Checkmk server with API access
- Automation user credentials configured on the Checkmk server

variables.name: checkmk_server
variables.title: Checkmk Server
variables.description: Value used for the checkmk configuration settings.

variables.name: checkmk_site
variables.title: Checkmk Site
variables.description: Value used for the checkmk configuration settings.
